texto: It absolutely helped - to write the father in both 'Juicy' and 'Beasts,' I had to see the whole story from his point of view. All of a sudden I understood more of what my own father must be going through - the fear, the frustration, the anger... the hope that he'll leave a legacy.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Lucy Alibar sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. A afirmação “It absolutely helped - to write the father in both 'Juicy' and 'Beasts,' I had to see the whole s…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, esperanca, fear, útil em momentos de fear e father.

frase_original: It absolutely helped - to write the father in both 'Juicy' and 'Beasts,' I had to see the whole story from his point of view. All of a sudden I understood more of what my own father must be going through - the fear, the frustration, the anger... the hope that he'll leave a legacy.
